name: staqpaq
description: A client-only build-manifest generator that exports deterministic staqpaq artifacts from structured app-build selections.

scripts.assert:core: node scripts/assert-no-ui-logic.mjs && node scripts/assert-single-orchestrator.mjs && node scripts/assert-no-direct-db-access.mjs && node scripts/assert-inert-interactive-surface.mjs
scripts.check: npm run assert:core && npm run validate:catalogue && npm run test:capabilities && npm run test:derive && npm run test:export && npm run test:orchestrator
